measurement_note: Size is K, the number of colors. The legal 2/4/8 tiers span 4x and give every color two balls. Equal box sizes then force equal numbers of colors assigned exclusively to each box, so the probability is 1. Rolling DP merges allocations with the same ball count and distinct-count difference in O(K^2 n B) time. Correct allocation-vector enumeration explores 3^K choices, completes normally at K = 8, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: two colors with two balls each
benchmark: four colors with two balls each
benchmark: eight colors with two balls each
